active_product_desc: Inactive products stay saved but can be filtered out.
add_to_quick_products_help: Place this product in the first empty Quick Products slot after saving
admin_created_sign_in: Admin account created. Please sign in.
advanced_debug_information_desc: Technical sync details are hidden by default.
advanced_sync_settings_desc: Technical actions and Host Transfer are kept here to protect the main Sync flow.
all_data_reset: All business data has been reset.
approve_host_transfer_desc: This device will stop being Host and {deviceId} will become the new Host. Continue?
auto_cloud_client_desc: Automatically pushes local changes quickly and polls cloud using the interval below.
auto_sync_desc: Automatically push local changes and pull host updates every 30 seconds.
backup_desc: Prepared for future cloud sync and backup.
backup_download_not_supported: File download is not supported on this device right now.
backup_preview_desc: You can download a JSON file, preview it, or restore it from a file or pasted text.
backup_restore_desc: Copy your data as JSON and restore it later on another device.
backup_restore_failed: Backup restore failed. Please check the pasted JSON.
barcode_not_registered_purchase: Barcode is not registered for a stock-tracked purchase product.
barcode_out_of_stock: No available stock for this product.
barcode_stock_limit_reached: Available stock limit reached for this product.
base_unit_help: Base unit uses the main barcode and sale price above. Add boxes, packs, grams, or other units here with their own barcode and conversion to the base inventory unit.
branch_id_recover_hint: Leave blank to recover the latest branch
built_in_admin_desc: The Admin role always has all permissions and cannot be edited or deleted.
cancel_purchase_desc: Cancel this purchase? If it was received, stock will be reversed.
cancel_return_confirm: Cancel/return invoice {invoice} and restore its stock?
claiming_lan_pairing: Claiming LAN pairing code and creating device token... 35%
clear_local_data_warning: This will erase all local data, settings, and Host pairing on this Client device. Other devices will not be affected.
cloud_api_url_helper: Use the default value unless your Store uses a custom server.
cloud_host_auto_desc: The HOST checks Vercel for remote requests and pushes official changes automatically.
cloud_pairing_code_helper: Paste the pairing code or scan the QR code from the Host.
cloud_pairing_complete_background: Cloud pairing complete. Initial data may continue in the background... 100%
cloud_push_failed: was saved locally, but Cloud push failed
cloud_push_success: pushed to Cloud. Clients can rebuild or sync now.
cloud_sync_desc: Allow remote devices to sync through the cloud.
cloud_sync_token_helper: Advanced only. Leave unchanged if already configured.
cloud_tenant_id: Cloud tenant ID / future Neon tenant
cloud_token_helper_professional: Host only. Client devices connect using a secure one-time pairing code.
confirm_host_safety_status: Before continuing, confirm your Host safety status:
confirm_recovery_saved: I confirm that I saved this recovery information securely.
connect_device_desc: Choose LAN or Cloud, then connect to the Host device.
connect_device_to_store: Connect this device to a Store
connect_device_to_store_desc: Choose LAN or Cloud, enter the pairing code, or scan the Host QR code. After pairing, the device downloads Store data and returns to Login.
connected_lan_sign_in: Connected to LAN host. Please sign in.
connected_store_sign_in: Connected to Store. Please sign in.
connecting_cloning: Connecting to host and cloning data...
connection_cloud_host_heartbeat_active: Cloud heartbeat is active for this host.
connection_cloud_not_configured: Cloud is not configured on this device.
connection_cloud_waiting_heartbeat: Cloud is reachable. Waiting for this host heartbeat to publish.
connection_lan_host_active: LAN host is active on this device.
connection_lan_not_configured: LAN is not configured on this device.
connection_lan_web_disabled: LAN is not available in the web version.
connection_no_host_heartbeat: No host heartbeat has been published yet.
connection_role_client_desc: This device is connected as a client. Host reachability is shown by transport.
connection_role_host_desc: This device is the main store host. LAN and Cloud are shown separately.
connection_role_local_desc: This device is running locally without a paired host.
create_admin_desc: Create your private admin account before using the app. The default admin password will be removed.
currencies_pricing_desc: Manage USD/LBP exchange rate, price display, default product currency, and LBP rounding.
customers_page_desc: Manage customer records for invoices and follow-up.
data_management_desc: Reset all business records and start with an empty database. Store profile is kept.
device_reset_sign_in: This device was reset. Please sign in or set up again.
discard_purchase_message: This purchase has unsaved items. Do you want to discard the changes?
discount_exceeds_subtotal: Discount cannot be greater than subtotal.
evidence_optional_help: Photo name, document reference, or short proof note
final_reset_warning: You will lose all data on this device. This reset cannot be undone from inside the app.
host_changed_notification: Host changed for {storeId} / {branchId}. New Host Device ID: {deviceId}
host_heartbeat_stale: Host heartbeat is stale. The Host is probably offline.
host_ip_desc: Use this IP from LAN Clients if automatic discovery does not find the Host.
host_ip_help: On Host this can stay as 0.0.0.0 or your LAN IP. On Client enter the Host LAN IP.
host_ip_helper: Enter the Host IP or scan the Host QR code.
host_ip_required_lan: Host IP is required for LAN connection.
host_lan_cloud_controlled: Host: LAN and Cloud are controlled from Sync page
host_mode_desc: Run this device as the main host for other devices on the local network.
host_transfer_activation_hint: Activation becomes available after the current Host approves this Device ID.
import_backup_host_only: Import backup is only available on the Host device.
invalid_login: Invalid username or password. Try again.
invalid_non_negative_number: Enter a number that is zero or greater
invalid_number: Enter a valid zero or positive number
invalid_purchase_quantity: Quantity must be greater than zero.
inventory_page_desc: Review all products, stock levels, and inventory value.
invoice_cancelled_stock_restored: Invoice cancelled and stock was restored.
invoice_empty: No items added to the invoice yet.
invoice_ready_desc: The invoice has been saved. You can print it now or later from the recent invoices list.
lan_client_connected_cloned: LAN Client connected and cloned from Host.
lan_credentials_saved: LAN device credentials saved and host snapshot downloaded... 100%
lan_pairing_code_helper: Paste the one-time LAN pairing code or scan the Host QR code.
lan_sync_alpha_note: Auto-sync note: clients push local changes and pull host updates every 30 seconds. Keep Sync now for manual troubleshooting.
lan_sync_desc: Allow nearby devices on the same network to connect to this Host.
name: Name
new_password_keep_current: New password (leave empty to keep current)
no_connected_devices: I do not have connected devices
no_customers_desc: Create customer records for invoices and follow-up.
no_expenses_desc: Track electricity, transport, rent, and other expenses.
no_host_heartbeat: No Host heartbeat was found. Start the Host device once to publish its status.
no_local_ipv4: No local IPv4 address detected yet.
no_low_stock_alerts_non_stock: No low-stock alerts for non-stock items
no_low_stock_items: No low stock items right now.
no_products_desc: Add your first product to start selling.
no_sales_desc: Create your first invoice from this page.
no_stock_tracked_products: No stock-tracked products are available for purchase receiving.
no_suppliers_desc: Add supplier records for purchasing and follow-up.
no_waste_loss_records: No waste or loss records yet.
pair_new_device_desc: Generate a single-use QR code or pairing code for a new device.
pairing_code_expired_or_used: Pairing code expired or already used. Ask the Host device for a new code.
pairing_code_state_help: This code is {status}. Generate a new code if needed.
pairing_token_help: Use the same token on Host and Client.
password_recovery_not_configured: Password recovery is not configured yet.
pdf_action_failed: PDF action failed on this device.
pos_checkout_desc: Add products quickly, adjust quantities, and save the invoice in one place.
pos_terminal_desc: Scan barcode, build a fast cart, complete payment, and print the receipt.
product_code_not_found: Product code was not found or the item is out of stock.
products_page_desc: Manage products, prices, and stock levels.
purchases_desc: Create purchase invoices, receive stock, and keep supplier buying history.
qr_detected_review_connect: QR detected. Review the connection details, then connect.
qr_pairing_empty: Scan a QR code or enter the pairing details manually.
quantity_delta_help: Use positive numbers to add stock and negative numbers to remove stock.
quick_grid_unsaved_changes_desc: You have unsaved quick product layout changes. What would you like to do?
rebuild_from_host_desc: This clears this Client device and downloads a fresh Host snapshot/events. Host data will not be changed.
rebuild_keep_open_desc: Keep this screen open while the Client clears local data, downloads the Host snapshot, and verifies it.
receive_now_desc: When enabled, product quantities and costs are updated immediately.
recover_existing_store_desc: Enter the Cloud API URL, official Store ID, and Recovery Key. This device will recover the permanent store identity and download the latest Cloud snapshot.
remember_me_desc: Skip login next time this app opens.
reset_all_data_confirm: This will delete all products, customers except Walk-in, invoices, suppliers, expenses, and reset invoice numbering. This cannot be undone. Create a backup first if needed.
reset_host_local_factory_desc: This is a local factory reset for this Host device. It will not create sync events.
reset_protection_backup_generated: A reset-protection backup was generated. Enter this token to continue:
reset_sync_setup_confirm: This will only reset Host/Client sync setup. Business data will stay on this device. Restart the app to see the setup screen again.
role_not_allowed_to_sell: Current role is not allowed to sell.
sale_validation_failed: Could not save invoice. Please recheck stock, quantities, and discount.
sales_page_desc: Create invoices and review recent sales.
scan_barcode_help: Point the camera at the product barcode. The code will be filled automatically.
scan_barcode_hint: Scan with barcode reader or type the code then press Enter
scan_pairing_qr_help: Point the camera at the Host pairing QR code.
scanner_feedback_desc: Control the confirmation sound and vibration after each barcode scan.
scanner_feedback_sound_desc: Play the standard Ventio beep after a successful scan.
scanner_feedback_vibration_desc: Use vibration or haptic feedback when available.
search_inventory: Search inventory by name, code, or category...
search_products_pro: Search name, SKU, barcode, brand, supplier...
signin_hint: Sign in with your Ventio username and password.
stock_ignored_non_stock: Ignored for services and non-stock items
stock_limit_reached: Stock limit reached for this product.
store_information_desc: Store name, phone, address, and logo.
store_recovery_security_desc: Save this recovery file in a secure place. It contains only store access information and no business data. The recovery key is shown here for export only; keep it private.
sync_failed_check_info: Failed. Please check the information and try again.
sync_settings_desc: Choose the device type first. Only the required settings are shown.
sync_setup_desc: Choose Host for the main device with clean local data. Choose Client to copy the full database from the Host, then sync automatically online/offline.
system_foundation_desc: Store, branch, device role, app role, and sync mode.
track_quantity_help: Enable stock tracking for this product
track_stock_desc: Disable it for services or non-stock items.
transfer_host_role_desc: Approve a Client device to become the new Host. This device will become a Client after approval.
uploading_host_event: Uploading critical Host event to Cloud... 70%
verifying_pairing_code: Verifying pairing code and creating device token... 35%
web_cloud_lan_desc: Web build uses Cloud API + Neon. LAN Host/Client is Desktop only.
pairing_state_refresh_failed: Device paired successfully. Restart sign-in if the new store data is not visible yet.
pairing_code_ready_to_connect_help: Pairing code entered. Tap Connect to Store to continue.
scan_or_enter_host_pairing_code: Scan the Host QR code or enter the pairing code from the Host.
connection_failed_check_code: Connection failed. Check the code and connection details, then try again.
device_connected_waiting_store_data: Device connected successfully. Waiting for Store data.
active_transport_desc: Only the selected transport will run on this Client. LAN and Cloud settings stay saved.
client_pairing_enter_or_scan_host_code: Scan the Host QR code or enter a Host pairing code in the LAN or Cloud settings below.
replace_host_reset_required: To connect this device to a different Host, reset local data first, then pair it again. This prevents accidental data replacement.
